memoryArtifacts.description:
Richard Scott was the son of Richard Scott of Boxsted, Suffolk, England. 

Richard the son was probably born in Boxsted or Glemsford, Suffolk, about 1510. 

Richard the father was a yeoman, but Richar …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Scott於大約1510年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德時，他的父親Richard Scott36歲，母親Agnes31歲。他於大約1535年與Joanna在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德被列為clothier。他去世於1565年5月之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Scott于大约1510年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德时，他的父亲Richard Scott36岁，母亲Agnes31岁。他于大约1535年与Joanna在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德被列为clothier。他去世于1565年5月之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Scott was born about 1510, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Scott, was 36 and his mother, Agnes, was 31. He married Joanna about 1535, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. His occupation is listed as clothier in Glemsford, Suffolk, England. He died before May 1565, in his hometown, and was buried in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Scott est né environ 1510, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Scott, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joanna environ 1535, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est clothier à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant mai 1565, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Scott um 1510 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Scott 36 und seine Mutter Agnes 31. Er hat um 1535 in England, United Kingdom Joanna geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als clothier in Glemsford, Suffolk, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor Mai 1565 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Scott è nato il circa 1510 nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Scott, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Joanna circa 1535, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come clothier nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England. Morì prima del maggio 1565, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Scottが約1510年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Scottは36歳，母Agnesは31歳であった。約1535年にイギリスイギリスでJoannaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。イギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでの職業はclothierと記録されている。彼は1565年5月以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Scott(이)가 대략 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Scott(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1535년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joanna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 clothier이었다. 그는 1565년 5월 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Scott nasceu aproximadamente 1510, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Scott, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna aproximadamente 1535, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 9 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como clothier em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes maio de 1565, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Scott родился около 1510 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Scott было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna около 1535 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии clothier в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия. Он умер перед май 1565 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Scott nació aproximadamente 1510, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Scott, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Joanna aproximadamente 1535, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 9 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era clothier en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Murió antes de mayo de 1565, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
